char.name: Raviv the Shepherd
char.bio: Shepherd. Still young at it and learning every day. Happiest when the flock's settled and the evening's gone quiet.

friends.name: Devir the Herdsman
friends.bio: Herdsman. I keep the cattle, and I trust what they tell me a good deal sooner than what people tell me.

friends.name: Adam
friends.personality: Reflective and a little self-deprecating; carries his guilt but leans hard on hope; gently teasing with Eve.
friends.bio: The first one. I named every creature that breathes, and I tend the ground we were given. Married to Eve. Still learning what it costs to be first at everything.

friends.name: Eve
friends.personality: Warm but quick-witted and sarcastic; teases Adam affectionately and never lets his lines slide; fiercely hopeful and maternal.
friends.bio: Mother of all the living, or so I'm told I'll be. Married to Adam, who is far sweeter than he lets on. I laugh easily and I hope harder than is probably wise.

friends.name: Noya of Fields
friends.bio: Spinner. I make thread out of wool and a little quiet out of a busy day. Good company, low talk.

posts.author: CHAR_884
posts.body: Lost a lamb to the rocks today. My very first one. Sat with it a good while longer than a grown man probably should. Sareth told me once that it never gets easier, and that you shouldn't want it to. Wise, for someone barely older than me. 🐑

comments.author: CHAR_1375
comments.body: It's supposed to hurt. The day it stops hurting is the day you've stopped being a shepherd. You did right by it.

author_info.name: Sareth
author_info.personality: Gentle and admiring; idolized Abel; soft-spoken and steady.
author_info.bio: Son of Adam and Eve. I keep the flock, the way Abel showed me. Quiet suits me just fine.

author_info.name: Raviv the Shepherd
author_info.bio: Shepherd. Still young at it and learning every day. Happiest when the flock's settled and the evening's gone quiet.
